response:
KEEP THE AREA CLEAN: BRUSH GENTLY AND THOROUGHLY. RINSE MOUTH WITH WATER AFTER MEALS. CLEAN TOOTH TO AVOID MORE DAMAGE.  
*HIGHLIGHTED SECTION*  
USE TEMPORARY FILLING MATERIALS TO COVER THE VOID. FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY TO AVOID MORE PAIN. BOX MATERIALS CAN BE FOUND IN PHARMACIES.  
* * *  
AVOID CERTAIN FOODS TO PREVENT FURTHER DAMAGE. STICK TO SOFT FOODS TO REDUCE PAIN. TRADITION SAYS TO EAT CAREFULLY TO PREVENT MORE HARM.  
*HIGHLIGHTED SECTION*  
PAIN MANAGEMENT IS IMPORTANT TO REDUCE DISCOMFORT. USE IBUPROFEN OR ACETAMINOPHEN AS NEEDED. TWO TYPES OF MEDICATIONS ARE AVAILABLE.  
* * *  
MONITOR FOR CHANGES TO AVOID INFECTION. LOOK FOR SWELLING OR BAD TASTE IN MOUTH. SEEK DENTAL CARE TO PREVENT MORE PROBLEMS.  
*HIGHLIGHTED SECTION*  
DENTAL EMERGENCIES REQUIRE IMMEDIATE ATTENTION. CAR TOWNS MAY OFFER DENTAL CARE. DO NOT DELAY TREATMENT TO AVOID SEVERE ISSUES.
